Sea Engine - Deterministic AMM model  Launch Flow:   1. User specifies target MCAP (1-10 ETH)   2. Factory calculates deterministic price: price = targetMcap / totalSupply   3. Factory converts price \u2192 sqrtPriceX96 using Q64.96 fixed-point math   4. Factory deploys token (1B supply minted to factory)   5. Factory initializes pool at calculated sqrtPrice   6. Factory adds full-range liquidity (100% tokens, 0 ETH)   7. Factory locks LP NFT permanently   8. Hook enforces dynamic tax + maxTx/maxWallet based on live MCAP  Key Invariants:   - Price is deterministic from target MCAP (no genesis gating)   - All tokens liquid from block 1 (no supply throttling)   - LP locked forever (protocol-owned liquidity)   - ETH is always currency0 (address(0) < any token address)","errors":{"OwnableInvalidOwner(address)":[{"details":"The owner is not a valid owner account. (eg. `address(0)`)"}],"OwnableUnauthorizedAccount(address)":[{"details":"The caller account is not authorized to perform an operation."}],"ReentrancyGuardReentrantCall()":[{"details":"Unauthorized reentrant call."}]},"kind":"dev","methods":{"checkDevCap(bytes32,address)":{"details":"Can be called by anyone to verify dev hasn't exceeded cap","params":{"devAddress":"Developer address","poolId":"Pool ID"}},"clearDevOverride(bytes32)":{"details":"Creator wallet can make ONE first buy within 1 minute of launch for up to 15% supply","params":{"poolId":"Pool ID to clear override for"}},"collectFeesFromPosition(bytes32,uint256)":{"details":"Callable by token creator or ecosystem deployer - distributes ETH and tokens with 70/30 split","params":{"poolId":"Pool identifier","positionIndex":"Position index (0-4)  NOTE: LP fees are collected in both ETH and tokens (standard for two-sided AMM pools). Both currencies are distributed using the same 70/30 split as Phase 1 hook taxes."}},"createLaunch((string,string,address,address,uint256,(address[5],uint16[5],uint8)))":{"details":"Mints ALL 5 positions at launch.      P1 gets tokens + bootstrap ETH. This is a safety fallback.      Uses modifyLiquidities (requires PoolManager to NOT be locked).","params":{"poolId":"Pool identifier","positionIndex":"Position index (0-4)"}},"owner()":{"details":"Returns the address of the current owner."},"previewSqrtPrice(uint256)":{"details":"Useful for UI to show expected price before launch"},"renounceOwnership()":{"details":"Leaves the contract without owner. checkDevCap(bytes32,address).details: Can be called by anyone to verify dev hasn't exceeded cap

clearDevOverride(bytes32).details: Creator wallet can make ONE first buy within 1 minute of launch for up to 15% supply

params.poolId: Pool ID to clear override for

collectFeesFromPosition(bytes32,uint256).details: Callable by token creator or ecosystem deployer - distributes ETH and tokens with 70/30 split

params.positionIndex: Position index (0-4)  NOTE: LP fees are collected in both ETH and tokens (standard for two-sided AMM pools). Both currencies are distributed using the same 70/30 split as Phase 1 hook taxes.

createLaunch((string,string,address,addr.details: Mints ALL 5 positions at launch.      P1 gets tokens + bootstrap ETH. P2-P5 get token-only one-sided liquidity.

returns.poolId: The pool ID for the token/ETH pair

mintNextPosition(bytes32,uint256).details: All positions are normally minted at launch. This is a safety fallback.      Uses modifyLiquidities (requires PoolManager to NOT be locked).

owner().details: Returns the address of the current owner.

previewSqrtPrice(uint256).details: Useful for UI to show expected price before launch

renounceOwnership().details: Leaves the contract without owner. It will not be possible to call `onlyOwner` functions. Can only be called by the current owner. NOTE: Renouncing ownership will leave the contract without an owner, thereby disabling any functionality that is only available to the owner.

transferOwnership(address).details: Transfers ownership of the contract to a new account (`newOwner`). Can only be called by the current owner.

PERMIT2().notice: Permit2 contract address (used for PositionManager token approvals)

TICK_LOWER().notice: Full range tick bounds (valid for tickSpacing=60)

TOTAL_SUPPLY().notice: Total supply per token (1 billion with 18 decimals)

bootstrapETH().notice: Bootstrap funding contract (provides free first launches)

checkDevCap(bytes32,address).notice: Check dev token balance to enforce 15% cap

clearDevOverride(bytes32).notice: Clear dev activation override - allows creator to buy up to 15% in first minute

collectFeesFromPosition(bytes32,uint256).notice: Collect accrued LP fees from a specific position with 70/30 split

createLaunch((string,string,address,addr.notice: Create a new token launch with deterministic MCAP-based price

mintNextPosition(bytes32,uint256).notice: Mint a position manually (fallback if not minted at launch)

previewSqrtPrice(uint256).notice: Preview sqrtPrice for a given target MCAP

retireOldPosition(bytes32,uint256).notice: Retire old position and recycle ETH

tokenIdToPoolId(uint256).notice: Position token ID to Pool ID mapping (for position management)
